summary: Remix Gallery MVP Testing - All features verified. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. GET /api/gallery/remix-feed returns curated items with quality filtering (thumbnails, descriptions, sorted by remixes_count). POST /api/gallery/{item_id}/remix increments count and returns prefill data. Frontend: RemixGallery component renders correctly in MySpace with 'People are remixing these' header, 4 cards, scroll arrows, and 'Can you make a better version?' competitive nudge. Clicking remix card navigates to Studio with 'You're remixing a trending story' banner visible. All previous MySpace features still work.

details: Returns items array with required fields: item_id, title, description, thumbnail_url, remixes_count, views_count, animation_style, story_text
Quality filter: items have thumbnails and non-empty descriptions
Returns prefill data with title, story_text, animation_style, source_item_id
Handles nonexistent items gracefully (success=False with error message)
Gallery has seeded content with thumbnails
Scroll arrows present (left and right) with data-testid
Competitive nudge 'Can you make a better version?' displayed with data-testid='remix-nudge'
Navigation state includes prompt, remixFrom with source='remix_gallery'
Toast notification 'You're remixing a trending story' shown
Remix banner visible in Studio when arriving from remix gallery
Banner shows 'You're remixing a trending story' text
Shows original title and remix count
CompletionPromptModal includes RemixGallery with placement='completion' limit={3}
StoryVideoStudio shows RemixGallery during generation (showWaitingExperience && loading)
Header shows 'While you wait… remix a trending story'
In Progress and Completed sections present

critical_code_review_comments: Backend remix-feed endpoint correctly filters for quality (has thumbnail, has description, title >= 3 chars)
Backend remix endpoint correctly increments count and returns prefill data with source_item_id
Frontend RemixGallery component has all required data-testid attributes for testing
SECTION_COPY correctly maps placement to header text (completion, myspace, waiting)
handleRemix correctly sets remixFrom.source = 'remix_gallery' for banner display
Studio remix banner correctly checks remixSource?.source === 'remix_gallery'
seed_data_creation: Gallery uses auto_seed_gallery_if_empty() with 20+ seeded items
context_for_next_testing_agent: Remix Gallery MVP fully tested. Backend endpoints /api/gallery/remix-feed and /api/gallery/{item_id}/remix working correctly. Frontend RemixGallery component renders in 3 placements: myspace (8 cards), completion (3 cards), waiting (4 cards). Remix banner in Studio shows when remixSource.source === 'remix_gallery'. All data-testid attributes present for automated testing. Previous MySpace features (project cards, sections, credit badges, progress timeline, toggle buttons) all working.
